calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Finkelstein for (petitioner) James Morgenstern.

The Court stated that it needs an endorsed filed copy of the supplement to the petition. Mr. Finkelstein stated that they filed a second amended petition and thought that it would override the other documents and presented a copy of the supplement for the court's review. The Court stated that there are two issues one of which is the 552.5 shares of Diamond Hill. Mr. Finkelstein stated that they filed a supplemental Inventory & Appraisal, that a copy was delivered to the examiner last month and that the amended petition addresses the issue. The Court stated that the next issue is P.C. 9202(b). Mr. Finkelstein stated that this was also addressed in the second amended petition, page 2 item 6, and that item 10 on page 3 addresses the omitted account. The Court stated that you do not refer to Diamond Hill in the supplement. Mr. Finkelstein stated not by name but in dollar amount. The Court confirmed that Mr. Finkelstein filed a second amended petition rather than a supplemental, that it looks like the amended petition was filed on 8/3/16, that the examiner's notes were prepared on 8/25/16 and that she must have had the second amended petition at that time. Mr. Finkelstein stated that he did not receive notes prior to this hearing and confirmed that he did not receive notes dated 8/25/16. The Court stated that it appears that the examiner is still requesting a supplement addressing the two issues, the Diamond Hill shares and 9202(b). Mr. Finkelstein stated that he has a copy of the supplement inventory & appraisal that was given to the examiner, that he addressed the incarceration issue and that this is a relatively straightforward intestate matter. The accounting petition was continued to September 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to file a supplement to the petition addressing the two issues.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
